raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "assertive claim linking mental states to physical outcomes to promote ethical self-regulation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "thoughts exert direct causal control over bodily health and aging",
    "morally negative ('unlawful') thoughts produce rapid physical deterioration",
    "positive ('glad and beautiful') thoughts produce rapid physical rejuvenation",
    "the body responds automatically to the moral quality of thoughts"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a mind-over-matter idealism but rests on unstated metaphysical assumptions rather than observable mechanisms",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "belief in the claim reliably motivates sustained positive affect, ethical conduct, and health-promoting behaviors without discouraging medical care",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the claim is interpreted literally as a sufficient medical explanation, leading individuals to attribute illness solely to thoughts and forgo evidence-based treatment"
}
